records.title: The Life of A Villainess [COMPLETED]
records.synopsis: Esmeralda only wanted one thing- To chase after Rael, the crown prince, and hopefully marry him someday. But all that hope fade into nothing when she remembered everything- This world? It's from a novel she read in her past life. And her? Esmeralda Schuan, the villainess who gets dumped, humiliated, and eventually destroyed. No thanks. This time, she's not chasing the crown prince. Not fighting over love. Not ruining her life for a story that isn't worth it. She just wants to enjoy her rich and pampered life. But somehow... The more she tries to step away from the story and save her future- The more she realizes everything isn't what she thought it would be.

records.title: Moonbound In The Beastworld
records.synopsis: One divine mistake. One unmarked female. A world of dominant beast rulers. Reborn into a realm where power manifests as glowing Halo Rings, Cassandra must navigate, rising Abyss monsters, and a hidden system that could change everything. But in a land where mating marks determine fate... Who will claim her first? And what will it cost the world?

records.title: 🗻භස්ම ගිරි
records.synopsis: "Say it again! Tell me what you want?" "ඔ..ඔයාව..." "Do you understand what that means? If you choose me,there's no stepping back from it." "I already chose you." "Then don't look away..." . "You choose this! And I don't let go of what's mine." _ _ _ _ Bound by fate, Held by love. බිඳී ගිය අතීතයක අතීතාවශේෂ මතින් ගොඩ නැඟි, 🐺 භස්ම ගිරි

records.title: The Villainess Knows What She Did: The Second Life of Evelyn de Harcourt
records.synopsis: NOTE: Chapters Uploaded twice weekly. She died at twenty-four. Evelyn de Harcourt was dragged to the execution block broken, burned, and stripped of everything she had ever been. The last thing she saw before the blade fell was a smile - satisfied, entertained - from the one person who had always wanted her destroyed. She wasn't innocent. She knows that. The cruelties she committed, the people she hurt, the isolation she built around herself like armour - all of it handed her enemies exactly what they needed to finish her. But knowing what you did wrong doesn't make dying for it any less terrible. She has been given something she didn't earn and doesn't deserve. A second chance. This time, Evelyn de Harcourt will not be the girl who burns every bridge and calls it strength. This time, she will not give them the weapons. This time, she will not make it easy. She remembers everything. Every mistake. Every cruelty. Every move her enemies made before she even knew they were enemies. Let them try again. Dark fantasy. Villainess regression. Reverse harem. Not a clean redemption story.

records.title: The Fifth Element
records.synopsis: The Fifth Element Do you know something about elements? Do you know that there is a fifth element? Do you believe in magic? Or you believe that it's just imagination and fantasy? Well, to answer those questions, let's go to an adventure with Solanna Layla Herrera who's life changed exactly on her 18th birthday. Make sure to wear your seatbelts because this story is a long ride. Are you ready? Let's go! Ps: this is an english story

records.title: Evil Reincarnation
records.synopsis: Chapter 00: "The Awakening" The rain poured relentlessly down on the gray streets. Maria Davis, twenty-five years old, hurried along under her broken umbrella. Her hair was a mess, her simple work clothes were wet and torn, and her eyes burned with exhaustion. It was always the same: go, work, live for others. Her family barely even looked at her unless it was to sacrifice her for her sister. She had studied and worked for years so her sister wouldn't have to struggle. But tonight... everything changed. Suddenly, the blinding light of a car's headlights hit her eyes. SCREECH! BANG! Her body went numb. In the darkness, she thought it was over. But a strange voice, like the whisper of the wind, echoed in her ear: "Do you want to live?" Her heart beat faster. She didn't want to give up like this. With all her might, she screamed: "Yes! Let me live! I promise this time, I'll be for myself!" A white light engulfed everything. When she opened her eyes, she was no longer Maria. In the mirror, the face of Elina Blackwood-the villain from a story she had just read-stared back at her: shining silver hair, a luxurious, ornate dress, and eyes filled with pride. The opulent room spun around her. She screamed in horror: "What is going on here?!!!" And silence... only silence. Her new life, in the body of a villain, had begun.

records.title: Beast World: The Cub Keeper.
records.synopsis: When the earthquake struck, Ye Xi thought her story had ended. But when she opened her eyes again, she found herself in a world where savage beasts ran rampant. Bound to the mysterious Cub-Rescuing System, Ye Xi's mission is simple- "Host, protect the beast cubs destined to perish in the Apocalypse." Simple... except every cub comes with danger, and every beast she meets threatens to steal her heart. A silver wolf trapped by fate, but who left her with his cubs and a promise to meet again. A prophet's descendant who can calculate every possible future, except the ones created by her existence. A desert spirit who wandered through danger and deception alone, until she became the reason he chose a path worth protecting. An ancient sea serpent who sheds life after life, only to find her waiting in every era he survives. Can a girl from the modern world survive in a land where only strength rules? She came to rescue beast cubs-but fate tied her heart to their world. Reverse Harem| Fantasy Romance | Apocalypse | Beast World | Ancient Bloodlines

records.title: Sunnybell Academy
records.synopsis: "i've always wanted a sister but my parents said that I'd hate it." Charlotte sniffles. "it's ok I'm your sister now lottie" Willow said, moving closer #1- Regression 12.2.26 #1-Regressing-14.3.26 #1-littles-14.3.26

records.title: The Scamming High Priest
records.synopsis: In her past life, she was a scammer-an excellent one at that. Unfortunately, scamming the wrong person, a Mafia Don running a human trafficking ring, ended with her running for her life... and getting hit by a truck. When she opens her eyes again, she finds herself inside a novel she read months ago. Worse, she's the female lead of a reverse harem story. A saintess blessed with the power of light. Chased by three obsessive male leads. Targeted by a jealous villainess. In other words-a life full of exhausting drama. Her solution? Run away from the plot. Using magical artifact rings to disguise herself as a man, she enters the temple and climbs the ranks until she becomes the youngest High Priest. If she's going to live in this world, she'd rather expose the temple's corruption and scam them back for their sins. But the story refuses to let her go. The male leads keep appearing. The villainess keeps watching her. And somehow... the plot still revolves around her-even when she's disguised as a man. Was escaping the story really possible? Or has the "High Priest" unknowingly become the most dangerous character in the novel?

records.title: In Another World As A Battleship
records.synopsis: University student Damian Clarke never expected his school field trip to end in tragedy. One moment he was admiring the massive steel giants displayed at the naval base museum... the next, a freak aircraft accident turned everything into fire, metal, and darkness. He thought that was the end of his story. But when he opened his eyes, something felt incredibly wrong. No ground beneath him. No body to move. No breath to breathe. Just... waves? "Where am I? And why am I floating? Wait... What the hell am I?!" *All illustrations and images belong to their respective owners. This story is created for fun and entertainment. There may be occasional grammar mistakes or plot inconsistencies.

records.title: Golden Dragon Tang Wulin 3
records.synopsis: The Age of Gods has long since ended, their voices no longer heard on the continent of Douluo. Humanity, standing on the shoulders of legends from its history, advanced soul technology to inconceivable heights. The humans of Douluo invented weapons of mass destruction, mechanized armor, and living metals. With these advancements, they went on to conquer the oceans and discovered two new continents. To fuel these new technologies, humanity hunted the soul beasts to the very brink of extinction. Once the dominant force of Douluo, the few surviving soul beasts now hide in the darkest recesses of their last sanctuary. The weakest have all been hunted, leaving only the strongest to scheme in the heart of the forest. The soul beasts, not willing to fade away, plot an uprising for their survival. In the midst of this, a god from a long forgotten era awakens in the depths of the Great Star Dou Forest to seek vengeance for the soul beasts. As darkness encroaches from the abyss, hope is found in a young boy who holds a power beyond divinity within himself-Tang Wulin! Hope for both humanity and the soul beasts, as the bridge between the two. He finds his way into the fabled halls of Shrek Academy, where he learns to wield his prodigious powers, makes friends and finds allies, eventually rising to become a towering leader. As he learns to harness his strength, danger lurks within the shadows as the various factions of humanity maneuver and plot to usurp Shrek Academy. Tang Wulin discovers the threat to the only world he knows as he sinks deeper into the intrigue. Meanwhile, camouflaged by the chaos and unbeknownst to the humans, the soul beasts' plot continues to steadily advance. To defend what he loves and reclaim what was lost, Tang Wulin must seek out the legacies of legends past and unlock the full might of the Golden Dragon King!

records.title: 𝓕𝐀𝐈𝐑𝐘𝓕𝐀𝐈𝐋.𝓔𝗫𝗘 ! .
records.synopsis: ﹕𝐘𝐀𝐍!𝐆𝐄𝐍𝐃𝐄𝐑𝐁𝐄𝐍𝐓! 𝐃𝐈𝐒𝐍𝐄𝐘 𝐗 𝐅𝐄𝐌. 𝐑𝐄𝐀𝐃𝐄𝐑 ─── You never considered yourself the protagonist of any grand tale-just a background character in your own life, more at home with fictional people on a screen than real ones in front of you. That didn't change when you spent too much money on a game you'd seen online, promising romance and intrigue in a fairytale world. It was supposed to be a harmless escape, another story to lose yourself in. But the game wasn't just a game. The loading screen glitched, the castle shimmered, and the pain that followed felt far too real. The lines between pixels and reality didn't just blur-they shattered. Now, you find yourself trapped inside that fairytale realm, in a world you only ever meant to play. The characters here are far more real-and far more dangerous-than any route or ending ever prepared you for.

records.title: Return of The Spoiled Heiress
records.synopsis: My first life was perfect. Good parents. A best friend. A mansion. Designer clothes. Everything a girl could ask for. I was a spoiled little brat who didn't understand how good she had it-until I died. My second life? The opposite. Born in an orphanage. No family. No future. No one gave a damn about me. Except one person. And I watched her get brutally murdered right in front of me. Then came the offer: train as an assassin, take my revenge. I said yes. I became a weapon-cold, calculating, unstoppable. And well, a little psychopathic. I got my revenge. I became one of the agency's deadliest killers. And then... I died. Again. Now I wake up back in my first life-as Eva Thorne, the spoiled heiress. Now I intend to live a perfectly normal life. Okay let's be real-me and normal don't belong in the same sentence.

records.title: Princess of Dragons
records.synopsis: Ciara Tarakona is the youngest princess of the Dragon Kingdom - known across the waters for their affinity with the mighty, winged beasts. One day, the southern Fire Kingdom sent for an alliance which would promise prosperity and crops in return for their airborne army in case of war. Only, to assure the deal would be upheld, the Fire Kingdom demanded one of the princesses would marry their king. That is how Ciara ended up across the waters in a kingdom filled with people terrified of her and the dragons she brings. With no one on her side, save for a single dragon, she is to face a whole kingdom filled with hatred. Not to mention a king, who likes her just as little as she does him.

records.title: Dragon Tamer - Book 1
records.synopsis: Marcie is an oddity in her village, the daughter of a widower with both village and outsider blood in her veins. She cares for her drunken father, and struggles to fit in with the rest of the village. Everything changes when she comes across two dragons, a mother and her new born, and unwittingly becomes the Tamer of the baby dragon when his mother dies. This new unlikely bond completely changes her life and opens doors to her future that she would have never thought possible whilst also causing her pain and heartache.

records.title: Memories of Time (#02)
records.synopsis: 𝗧𝗵𝗲 𝗘𝗹𝘆𝘀𝗶𝗮𝗻 𝗟𝗲𝗴𝗮𝗰𝘆, 𝗕𝗼𝗼𝗸 #02 || "Time remembers everything - even what the gods would rather forget." The war against monsters was meant to be the end. The peace of the realms was restored, the gods stayed on their thrones, and time was supposed to move forward. Unfortunately, the Fates had a different plan for the Elysians. Constantly sent on missions beyond Elysium Academy, the demigods begin to notice that something in the realm has shifted. Soleia, daughter of Hades, is haunted by visions no one else can see - fragments she has never lived and a future she refuses to accept. With a titan awakening and fate already sealed, Soleia must fight to rewrite what was never meant to be changed. But she must beware, for time remembers. And it never forgets those who try to change what has already been written. This story is written in Taglish. Cover by: Levistress Started: 01/26/26 Ended: ---

records.title: Claimed By Darkness
records.synopsis: By the age of sixteen, all elves are claimed by one of the six Gods and inherit some of their abilities. There is Aria (air), Lionel (earth), Kalama (fire), Beck (water), Gianna (mind), and Kai (dreams). Sorry, I seem to have left out one of the Gods, the most powerful God. Caspian, the God of darkness and death. He is the outsider, the most feared and dangerous God. Only two people have ever been claimed by Caspian, and they were both driven to insanity. Odette Parks was finally going to the academy to be claimed and learn to control her new powers. But instead of a fun high school experience, she is met with a scary prophecy... *Warning: Strong language! * COMPLETED

records.title: Darkness Wears Her Crown
records.synopsis: When the king of Aizasea is assassinated, eighteen-year-old Celvene is wise enough to keep her head down after witnessing the attack. As a circus mage, she has no business in politics - until the next ruler is selected by ritual, and Celvene is the sole soul capable of wielding the king's sword. Declared the destined queen, Celvene expects to rise... but her kingdom has other plans. Instead of honoring the ritual, the brutish general Aleksandr brands her an upstart peasant and forces her into the castle as a servant, hoping she'll disappear quietly. With their mortal enemy continuing to strike the city, the people yearn for a more ruthless leader, and Aleksandr is hellbent on seizing the crown for himself. On top of that, forbidden and deadly magic begins to blossom in Celvene's heart, threatening to unravel all she holds dear. The magic corrupts her mind and drives her to acts she commits against her will, tainting her already struggling reputation. And among the enemy ranks stands her childhood best friend, fighting for the other side of the war. Facing her again is a complication Celvene can't ignore. As tensions rise and the horrors of war unfold, Celvene uncovers twisted secrets that could spell the death of her city. Will she survive long enough to fulfill her destiny as queen, or will the shadows of dark magic and war consume her? BY ROYAL DECREE: ✓ Circus-mage underdog protagonist ✓ Grumpy sapphic love interest with a heart of gold ✓ Corruption magic fueled by famine ✓ Iconic, sassy non-binary mentor ✓ Worldbuilding inspired by the Four Horsemen ✓ Twists and turns galore FEATURED: ♛ @Fantasy's Epic/High Fantasy

records.title: A Dragon's Rider (Unedited)
records.synopsis: UNEDITED VERSION ( edited version on my page) In a world where every year, five male children from each city and village between the ages 15-18 are chosen to become dragon riders, what happens when only four males get chosen from one village? And what happens when they test the girls and the fifth child is chosen? Editor Credits: @Weylyn_Wolf @arvialle

records.title: Surfacing - Book One in the Swans Landing Series
records.synopsis: Sixteen-year-old Mara Westray has just lost her mother, and now, being shipped off to live with the father she doesn’t know is not how she imagined grieving. She’s already counting down the days until she turns eighteen and can leave the tiny island of Swans Landing. But from the moment she steps off the ferry, nothing is as ordinary as it looks. Whispers of a haunting song on the wind make her see impossible things, and she isn’t sure she can trust her judgment about what is real and what isn’t anymore. Maybe she can’t even trust her judgment about quiet Josh Canavan, whose way of speaking in riddles and half-truths only confuses her more, luring her deeper into the secrets hidden beneath the ocean’s surface. As she tries to unravel the events that led to her mom fleeing the island sixteen years ago, Mara finds that the biggest secret of all is only the beginning. SURFACING is currently available in ebook format from Amazon.com, BarnesandNoble.com, iTunes, Smashwords, and other ebook retailers. Available in audiobook from Audible, and in print at Amazon. Visit my website for more information on the Swans Landing series and where to purchase the ebooks: http://www.shananorris.com/surfacing/

records.title: The Veil Between Us
records.synopsis: The Soulmark chooses two people to balance the world, pairing the cruel with the good. Elara always thought the Soulmark is a legend. When she's marked, she expects a distant lord. Instead, it chooses a king. A cruel king. A silver-eyed shadow in her mind. One month to fulfill the mark... or both lose a piece of their soul forever.

records.title: Laurel and Bone
records.synopsis: -"She'll ruin you! She'll bring you to your knees." His answer was a prayer, murmured above me. "Even better."- ~A tale of oaths, and the people who break them~ Cassia Aurelius is a thief, an orphan, and a girl who made a terrible mistake... she ate Fae food. Now she's trapped in a realm of beautiful half-truths disguised as mercy, where the price of survival is combat. Forced into deadly trials before a crowd of merciless Fae, Cassia fights to keep her life, unaware that the game was never meant for her to win. When a dashing Fae Lord steps in to save the hapless human girl, she sees no way to live long enough to find her way home, except his unwanted offer of marriage. This Lord had his own reasons for this chivalry, however. She was not to be a bride, but a key. Hunted, terrified, and betrayed, Cassia finds an unlikely ally in the court of her betrothed. One with secrets that echo her own... one who leads her to a reclusive and broken Fae Lord who sees the darkness she hides. As war brews and ancient magic stirs, love becomes a weapon. Cassia must decide who to trust before she loses more than her home and freedom. In the Fae realm, looks can be deceiving. And after a life of hot and cold, Cassia isn't certain she can trust a "just right". TWs: -Physical & Emotional abuse -Domestic Violence -Torture and Imprisonment -Major Character Death -Themes of Self Harm and Suicidal Ideation (part of character arc, not glorified) -On the page sex scenes (consent implied or explicit, but present) Read with care!

records.title: A Melodious Song (Yandere Twins x reader)
records.synopsis: -This is a sequel to the story A Dimensional Tune (Yandere Twins x reader) - You have been with the brothers for over a year now, yet they still torment you, however a visitor arrives at the mansion. Who is this strange individual and what will happen upon their arrival? Will new games be played and what will fate hold in store for you? New adventures await as do new perils while a distant song captivates you and throws you into the hands of a new king. Listen to the melodious song and see where it takes you. - I do not own any of the music videos, or content within the videos. Moreover, I do not own the cover picture. All rights go to the respectful owners. I do own my writing, so don't steal. Thank you for reading. This story is also on Quotev under my profile name Darkened Warrior.

records.title: The Midnight Academy
records.synopsis: Amelia's whole world was turned upside down when she made it to the renowned Prestige College. Burdened with her family's legacy and her own ambitions to establish her identity, she finds herself in a situation where things are very different from how they seem. Was she losing her mind? In the midst of it all- Adrian Vanderkoff, the intimidating brat with celestial good-looks got obsessed with her.

records.title: SYSTEM ERROR: The Duchess Who Died Twice
records.synopsis: © moonpsyche_, 2026. Original Work. Plagiarism is Prohibited. The North Shall Not Fall Three lives. One final save file. In her first life, Eliana "Lia" Javier was the Empire's most hated spoiled brat. Exiled to a frozen monster-hell by her own brothers and ignored by her cold husband, she died alone on a crumbling wall. In her second life, she and her brothers were reborn in the modern world as elite soldiers. They were lethal, traumatized, and too emotionally stunted to speak. They died again without ever breaking the silence. Now, two cosmic IT Administrators have punted them back to the beginning with a System and a mandate: "Fix your family and save the North, or we're deleting your save files. Permanently." Reborn in the carriage carrying her to exile, Lia has exactly three hours to change her fate. She's armed with a HUD, a psychic party chat with her brothers, and 21st-century military tactics. Lia is done playing the victim. The North is falling, her brothers are racing to catch up, and the System is watching. One wrong move, and it's Game Over. For real this time.

records.title: Almost Gone Forever
records.synopsis: Percy didn't even know what he 'supposedly ' did. All he knew now was pain, indescribable pain. He had been disowned by Poseidon, and now water hates every molecule in his body. The water that once healed him, now wants to kill him. Percy must find a way to survive, that also includes hiding from everything in the Greek world. All the while, the water in his blood is slowly killing him. He needs to find a way to get back into everyone's good graces, escape, or die. Percy is running out of time. I own nothing in this story but my own story line, and a few of my own characters, the rest go to the artists who made the cover picture and ya boi Rick Riordan. 4/19/18 #907 in Fantasy 5/3/18 #656 in Fantasy 5/8/18 #267 in Fantasy 4/15/22 #1 in Toa 5/16/18 #6 in Perlia

records.title: 𝓕𝐀𝐓𝐄'𝓢 𝓡𝐄𝐐𝐔𝐈𝐄𝐌
records.synopsis: ౨ৎ˚₊✧﹕𝙔𝘼𝙉𝘿𝙀𝙍𝙀 𝙑𝘼𝙍𝙄𝙊𝙐𝙎 𝙓 𝙄𝙎𝙀𝙆𝘼𝙄! 𝙁𝙀𝙈. 𝙍𝙀𝘼𝘿𝙀𝙍 ─── ꪆৎ ˚⋅ When the clock struck midnight, you never expected that your late-night gaming session would be the last time you'd see your world. Trapped in the world of your favourite, but unforgiving, otome game, you wake up as the story's protagonist - a noblewoman whose life teeters on the edge of destruction. This is where rumours can kill, alliances shift with the wind, and one wrong move could mean your doom. But you refuse to be just another pawn in a game of power. Armed with your knowledge of the plot and a will to survive, you navigate the treacherous waters of imperial court life, drawing the attention of multiple people. As the threads of fate tighten around you, you must gamble everything to change your destiny. But in a world where even the smallest action can have deadly consequences, will you be able to rewrite your story - or will you fall victim to the very game you once played?

records.title: Bird Wings
records.synopsis: Wren's life is about to change forever - but not how she expects it to. Kidnapped on her wedding day, she finds herself trapped in a mountain cave, unable to return home with no company outside of the inhuman creature that took her. *** "Wait, Wren! Not that way!" It was darker here and panic limited her vision, but she could see it reaching for her; its wings like two huge looming shadows behind it. "Get away! Don't touch me! No, let me go!" She shrieked. She screamed in earnest as a hand took hold of her arm, and then even more when her own hand reached for something to hang onto and grasped at empty air. She had been scrambling towards a sudden drop! The hands hauled her back, but she still struggled. She didn't want to look at it, and she still wasn't sure she wouldn't rather take her chances with the open air instead. "Stop it, I'm not going to hurt you! You'll hit your head on the rock or something. Wren, please!" It knew her name. Somehow it knew her. She was going to die! "Let me go! Stop touching me!" She was sitting on the rocky floor now with her back against an uneven wall, and it was trying to pin her down and hold her still. She kept her eyes turned away and struggled helplessly, but it was no use. It was strong like a human man too, and she couldn't keep it off of her. The wings had moved until they curved around them both and shut out a lot of the light. Its face was so near hers that she could feel its breath brushing against her skin. "Please just look at me for a second. Just look. I'm not going to hurt you." One of the hands grabbed her chin and forced her head to turn, and then she was looking straight into a pair of dark brown eyes. It had a human face too. She had been expecting something monstrous or ghastly, and the surprise made her falter for a moment. He looked young, with a bad haircut and an earnest expression on his face. "I'll let go of you, okay? Just don't lunge around like that anymore, you'll get hurt." He whispered.

records.title: The Daily Life of a Melon-Eating Slacker
records.synopsis: Lou Yuqing transmigrates into a cultivation world and binds to a gossip system, perfect for someone who just wants to lie flat and watch the drama unfold. There's only one problem. Her thoughts... aren't private. At the disciple acceptance ceremony, the esteemed Immortal Venerable Zixiao is about to take in a final disciple, until Lou Yuqing casually thinks: [That disciple will betray him in the future, steal his Daoist partner, loot his pills, and leave him a laughingstock of the cultivation world.] The Immortal Venerable's expression changes instantly. "We have no master-disciple fate." The chosen disciple: stunned. Lou Yuqing: even more stunned. Things only get worse from there. [Those two girls? Both impostors. The real one was thrown into a snake pit.] Sect Leader: "How dare you!" [That 'son-in-law'? Actually a woman in disguise.] Young Lady: "...A woman?!" [That patient? An undercover traitor who just crippled the Medical Sage and escaped.] Enforcement Hall: "Seize him!" Lou Yuqing just wanted to quietly eat melons and mind her business... But somehow, every thought she has gets broadcast to the entire sect. As secrets unravel, scandals explode, and chaos spreads- The sect prospers. Justice is served. And Lou Yuqing, the unwilling gossip machine... Becomes the darling of the entire cultivation world.

records.title: Rebirth of the Duke Wife
records.synopsis: The gavel falls, and a bullet follows. Marigold Cortez was the undisputed queen of the courtroom, a brilliant, ruthless criminal defense attorney feared by allies and enemies alike. But after winning her most dangerous case yet, an assassin's bullet cuts her life short. Instead of the abyss, Marigold wakes up in a lavish, unfamiliar world, trapped inside the body of Anastasia Celestine Villareal. Anastasia is the despised, neglected wife of the terrifying Duke Lucien Draven Evernight, a man who commands fear across the empire and looks at his wife with nothing but cold disdain. But the Duke has no idea who he's dealing with now. Marigold doesn't do victim roles, and she definitely doesn't back down from a fight. Armed with a lawyer's sharp mind, a merciless wit, and a new lease on life, she is ready to turn the ducal manor into her new courtroom. The trial of her life has just begun, and this time, Marigold is playing by her own rules.

records.title: The Sixth Life of Medusa
records.synopsis: Medusa, the mortal daughter of Phorcys and Ceto, was not always a monster. Once an adored priestess of goddess Athena, she offered her complete devotion--until her beauty drew the attention of a lecherous god, and death came soon after. But that was many lives ago. Now at her fifth go at life, Medusa finally lets her guard down and starts a family. But an old nemesis soon resurfaces and thrusts her into the lethal world of her first life. *** A little note: This story will contain all three books in one. Book one is already complete at chapter 52.

records.title: 265 IQ in an Otome Game
records.synopsis: Mikoto Adachi is the renowned savior of the world, with her 265 IQ, she saved the world, by actually putting into action laws. She famously became president at only ten years old and used that power to ban plastic in America, and put recycling bins on every street. She used military violence to persuade other countries to do the same, and many parts of the world are doing just fine without a huge amount of pollution. However, at the age of 12, she was assassinated. Thankfully, she implemented a plan for the world, if she did demise...BUT WHY IS SHE THE VILLAINESS IN AN OTOME GAME!?

records.title: The Ironheart
records.synopsis: Eternity called. The heroes answered. History rests on the four of them. With an Anali shapeshifter, a man with a dream. With a valkyrie, a warrior with the mind of a scholar. With a saint, a village girl with a shadowed future, and with a yuki, in line to a throne. Eternity called, and with no one to answer, they did.

records.title: Second to None Reincarnation
records.synopsis: I'm Jessica a 16 year old high school student. I am a very skilled person. I don't have any family and I don't have a home. My life is horrible. One day I saved someone but in the process I died. God decided to give me a present.

records.title: Ashes of Evolution
records.synopsis: Eliza White only wanted to try a new VR game. How could a person that lived off of entertainment refuse an offer to experience new thrills? The next thing she knew, she woke up naked inside a laboratory, wearing the body of an artificially augmented human with less than morally adequate means... Now trapped in the world of Satellite Invasion, Eliza must survive ruthless experiments, evolving monsters, futuristic civilizations, and hidden horrors while uncovering the truth behind the game itself. But there was one problem. Her character was never meant to exist. With forbidden genes sleeping inside her body, Eliza possessed abnormal power that should not have been possible to have. Hunted by factions seeking control over her and haunted by instincts that are no longer entirely human, she must decide what she's willing to become in order to survive. Because in Nebula, humanity is weak... and evolution merciless. Disclaimer: there may be a teeny bit of foul language.... nothing major though. hehe. __ __ __ Now for some precisions, I am very new to this (writing) so if you have anything to say regarding how I write or if something doesn't makes sense and things like that, well instead of a hate comment I'll appreciate it if your critics are good willed and meant for me to improve myself. Which I will if you do what I asked for of course ;-). There won't be a lot of quick updates since I am doing this on my free time but it still won't be 'too' slow. Well that I hope. That's all I wanted to say, so I hope you enjoy the story ! I publish this story here in Wattpad, but also in Royal Road and WebNovel. :)

records.title: Ares
records.synopsis: In a world where the whispers of the gods can be heard by those who truly listen, a young woman named Elara finds herself trapped in a cycle of unrequited love. Every morning and night, she offers heartfelt prayers to Aphrodite, the Goddess of Love, yearning for her destined soulmate. But when her pleas grow too frequent and too desperate, the enchanting goddess becomes exasperated with Elara's relentless requests. In a twist of fate, Aphrodite decides to grant Elara's wish-but not in the way she expects. She summons Ares, the formidable God of War, whose tumultuous past with Aphrodite is shrouded in mystery and passion. Ares is a warrior of unmatched strength and intensity, embodying everything Elara thought she wanted, yet his presence brings with it a whirlwind of chaos and conflict. As Elara grapples with the challenge of winning Ares's heart before time runs out, she discovers that love is not merely a fairytale; it's a battleground filled with trials, tribulations, and unexpected truths. With the clock ticking and the gods watching closely, Elara must navigate her feelings for the brooding god while uncovering the depth of her own strength and desires. Will she find a way to connect with Ares, or will their divine differences prove insurmountable? In this enchanting reimagining of Greek mythology, Elara learns that love is as fierce and unpredictable as the gods themselves, and sometimes, the heart's true calling comes from the most unexpected places.

records.title: The Devils Angel
records.synopsis: Angel was just a normal teenage girl. Wonderful friends, a perfect boyfriend...until she gets involved in a weird myth/ritual her friend finds online. But it doesn't stop there. What happens when she offers herself as the offering the summon the Devil to try and prove a point ? And he actually comes to claim his gift? She is forced to leave behind her family,friends, and perfect boyfriend. What will come of this Angel and the Devil? Read to find out :)

records.title: Marked by Fate
records.synopsis: Their meeting was no accident. Long before they spoke, before their names were carved into legend, the stars had already conspired. A bond, older than prophecy and deeper than time, tugged them toward each other. Not as enemies. Not as saviors. But as soul-bound equals - chosen by something greater. Not all fates are cursed. Some are callings. And some are written in seafoam and shadow - impossible to escape, and more impossible to ignore. A/N: Does not follow any Harry Potter or Percy Jackson film/book storylines. This is made from imagination and I only take credit for my own character (Persephone "Percy" Jackson), credits to the creators/writers who made all the other characters. Thank You!

records.title: CONSTELLATIONS - individual literary roleplay
records.synopsis: open ^^ mature content inside, so if you are a minor, please don't interact :)

records.title: I'll become a villain in my next life
records.synopsis: "Why? I tried to help people but they just abandoned me! betrayed me! they don't want me to play hero!? then fine I'll be the villain" Those are the last words of 'Riruko Kaido' codename: Ragnarok, a level 5 Esper with the power to control matter and elements as long as has knowledge of the subject as he died from the hands of the very people he protects he was betrayed by his friends, abandoned by his lover, and sold out to the researchers by the very person he trusted...... follow Riruko Kaido as he live out his life in another world with a determination to become a villain.... will he be able to maintain his word to become a villain? or will his past personality preserve the goodness in his heart? will he be a villain or a hero?

records.title: Echoes of The Mist
records.synopsis: Freya's life changed in one evening now. She now has to deal with unknown family secrets, loss, a choice that'll either change her life for the better or for the worse. An heir, a vessel and lastly a tool. The choice is up to her. A book about demigods, monsters, betrayal, and magic. If you like Percy Jackson, Blood of Hercules, Harry Potter or Primrose Academy you'll love this.

records.title: The Unchipped
records.synopsis: 2000 years after The Unseen, we find Sara coming of age in a modern Aragonia. Everything has changed, or has it?

records.title: The Witch of the Woods
records.synopsis: While on the run from her abusive older brother, her only remaining family, Adalie comes across a severely injured forest spirit named Koa, who begs Adalie for help. Adalie takes them to nearby ruins of a grand old manor, where the spirit explains that they were attacked by a dangerous creature known as The Hybrid, a minion of the Dark Emperor Kaldareth. He rules over the Isen forest with an iron fist, so when he heard the locals whispering about a secret prophecy, one that speaks of a human girl leading to his downfall, he sent out his minions on a relentless search, attacking innocent spirits and animals, questioning them on whether they've seen her, and then killing them, so the girl won't know of her destiny should she come across one of his victims. Luckily, the Hybrid was sloppy, and Koa is still alive... but barely. They strike a deal with Adalie. I exchange for her help in collecting the ingredients required to make a potion which will save them, Koa will free her from living her brother. So Adalie sets out on a dangerous quest, aided by a mysterious yet strikingly handsome river spirit, Zyair. Thrown into a dark new fantasy world crawling with watchful eyes and lingering threats, will Adalie succeed and save Koa? Or will she be captured by the cruel Emperor whose only goal is to kill her? (Draft 1)

records.title: 𝐀 𝐖𝐈𝐋𝐋𝐎𝐖'𝐒 𝐒𝐈𝐆𝐇 - Alice in Wonderland AU
records.synopsis: "I think I'm madly, passionately, entirely, and ardently in love with you, my love," Lady Veroniqué breathed, her lips brushing against the thick sewn flesh ones of the monster's. Her palm hovered lightly above his muscled chest, and she felt heat radiate off of him in waves, engulfing her form completely. His hand, mighty and thick, brushed against her back, shaking and careful, desperately wanting to touch her. He grunted low, and her breath hitched, her eyes half closed. ༄ 𝘼 𝙘𝙤𝙪𝙧𝙩𝙚𝙨𝙖𝙣 𝙖𝙣𝙙 𝙖 𝙢𝙖𝙣-𝙢𝙖𝙙𝙚 𝙢𝙤𝙣𝙨𝙩𝙚𝙧. The year is 1860, When the twenty and five year old beautiful and strange Veroniqué, courtesan and spy to The White Queen in The White Kingdom in Wonderland, stumbles across a horror in a lab in a human's house on one of her missions to this century's world, she's exposed to a nightmare she wants to embrace. Stitched from flesh and electricity, a creature born of forbidden science and arcane sorcery, a colossus trapped between life and death. Entranced, and ever so curious, she frees the man-made monster and brings him to Wonderland-an unsettling giant of silence and shadow. As Wonderland's delicate balance threatens to shatter under the weight of old betrayals and new dangers, Veroniqué must navigate the impossible-teaching the unteachable, loving the unlovable, and facing a darkness that twists even the brightest dream into a waking nightmare. *[Disney's Alice in Wonderland AU, dark, blood & gore, slow-burn, fantasy, eventual smut, dark fairytale, 18+ only please.] Highest Rankings; #3 in 'aliceinwonderland' out of 4.81k stories. #1 in 'thewhiterabbit' out of 38 stories.

records.title: My Chocolate
records.synopsis: This is simple actually. He loves chocolate and he wants it and what he wants he gets.

records.title: Given
records.synopsis: WATTPAD ORIGINAL EDITION Island princess Yenni is searching for a way to save her father's life, but a handsome yet infuriating shapeshifting dragon becomes an unexpected distraction. ***** As a princess of the Moonrise Isles, Yenni is all-but-engaged to the prince of a neighbouring tribe. She knows it's her duty to ensure peace for her people, but as her father's illness steadily worsens, she sets out on a sacred journey to the empire of Cresh, determined to find a way to save him at any cost, even though failure could mean the wrath of her gods and ruin for her people. One further complication? On the day she arrives at the Prevan Academy for Battle and Magical Arts, she meets an arrogant dragon shifter who claims she's his "Given", or destined mate. Muscular, beautiful (and completely infuriating), he's exactly the kind of distraction Yenni can't afford while her father's life hangs in the balance. But by rejecting him, is she fighting her feelings -- or her fate?

records.title: Escape From Tickle Tower
records.synopsis: Rachel is a young woman that lived in the Tower that one day appeared. With the goal of escaping the tower, she leaves home and heads out alone to look for an exit. However, she quickly learns that she can't do much alone. Follow as she explores the tower filled with tickle monsters, meets new people, and looks for a way out of the building everyone doesn't want to call home.

records.title: The Dark Heir (SHORTLIST - Open Novella Contest 2019)
records.synopsis: **Featured on DARK FANTASY and ADULT FICTION reading lists** WARNING: EATING OR DRINKING WHILE READING THIS STORY IS HIGHLY INADVISABLE. Once Upon A Time, Good Omens, Monty Python, and Arrested Development had a back-alley three-way and birthed a fairytale. Gerald wasn't supposed to be stuck living seven centuries in the future. He definitely wasn't supposed to be "mentoring" The Dark Lord's progeny in the hopes that she would decide to save the world rather than destroy it. In fact, he wasn't even supposed to be named Gerald (the name of every other male in his family for three hundred years), because everyone assumed a weak-chinned, balding, forgettable man, who was just a magician, could never be who Geraldo The Foreshadower prophesied. But that's what assuming gets you, and here he was saddled with a fate he never asked for, in a time he didn't know, surrounded by people he didn't want to like, and he was out of Firewine AGAIN! The Dark Heir is a darkly satirical tale of assumptions, anti-heroes, and apocalypses, where the road to hell is actually a themed water-park slide covered in slightly less urine than a real one. It drops literary and film references faster than an NYC socialite drops names, and promises endless laughs - including, but not limited to, sad chuckles, guffaws, uncontrollable giggles at inappropriate moments, brays, barks, cackles, snorts, cachinnations, and the occasional howl (though that may be the Welsh Werewolves showing up unannounced). Consider yourself warned... Reviews: "Completely and adorably bonkers," says @floranocturna "Hilarious in every way. Even when I cringed, I laughed," says @LadySapphire2018 Winner of The Trident Awards

records.title: White Stag (PERMAFROST #1)
records.synopsis: Don't show fear. Don't attract attention. Don't forget who the monsters are. Those are seventeen-year-old Janneke's three rules to surviving in the Permafrost. Her family is dead, her village burned to the ground, and now she's a slave in a court of merciless goblins. Though her master, Soren, offers her a small sphere of protection, it comes at the cost of abandoning humanity and their ways for good. When the Goblin King is defeated in a fight, it ignites an ancient competition to become the next King. The goal is simple: kill the sacred White Stag before the other goblins kill you. Soren sees it as the perfect opportunity to shape Janneke's acceptance of the goblins' way and give in to the hatred and violence festering inside of her. Janneke's only hope for survival is to outrun, outfight, and out-kill every creature in her path, all the while dealing with Soren, whose fierce desire for her to be a goblin is shadowed by his fascination for her human heart. Hunting the Stag is Janneke's best chance at revenge over those who enslaved her, but to succeed, she'll have to watch her humanity bleed out like the creatures she's sworn to kill. **CREDIT FOR THE WONDERFUL COVER GOES TO @seventhstar *** ***COMPLETED. THE SEQUEL, GOBLIN KING, IS IN THE PROCESS OF WRITING AND POSTING. ENJOY!!!***

records.title: Whisper of the Long Lost Princess (Academy of Secrets)
records.synopsis: For centuries, the hidden kingdoms have whispered the same forbidden tale a prophecy buried in moonlight and starfire. They speak of a child born beneath a blood moon and a sky of falling stars, a girl whose breath holds the hush of the wind, whose heart echoes the voice of the earth, whose touch summons flame and frost and thunder. A princess, stolen before the first dawn could crown her hidden among mortals, her name erased, her power sealed behind iron gates and old secrets. They called her lost. They prayed she would never be found. For if she woke, the eight sleeping elements would rise again light, shadow, fire, water, earth, wind, lightning, and the spirit that binds them all. And kingdoms built on lies would fall to their knees before the child they tried to forget. But secrets are never truly buried. And fate never forgets its promises. In a quiet village on the edge of the old forest, she bakes bread in the warmth of a small bakery, her memories hidden behind a smile and the hush of rising dough. She answers to Lunaria a name she doesn't remember choosing and dreams of gates she cannot open. But the wind knows her name. The earth hums beneath her feet. Fire flickers when she passes. The storm watches. And the Academy that sealed her power watches too, its Council whispering that the lost star has begun to stir. When the iron gates crack open, secrets slip through a young elemental prince whose touch tastes of storms, shadows that whisper old truths, and a sister cloaked in starlight waiting to bring her home. In the hidden halls of the Academy of Secrets, where loyalty is as fragile as glass and power is more dangerous than lies, Lunaria must remember who she is before the kingdoms rise or burn in her name. Her story begins where all lost things do in the hush of winter, under a sky heavy with falling stars. And when she wakes, the world will never be the same.

records.title: Laugh For Me - Book 1
records.synopsis: Amber awakes in a fairytale land that has strange values that make her laugh... literally. Through every twist and turn she is greeted with laughter, love, and even some mystery. As the story progresses Amber finds herself in the clutches of another man who's touch isn't quite so soft. Maybe the Fairylands were meant to treat her well, but fate lead her to a place where evildoers dwell.

records.title: Fridging: Reincarnated as a Joke Character in a Generic Magic Academy Story!
records.synopsis: My name was Randi Pangabekti, until I died of brain cancer and got reincarnated into the generic magic academy anime "Steelheart of the F-Rank Copymaster Cyberknight" as a random side character named Ryouhei Watanabe instead of the main character Kouki Hiromasa. Not only was Ryouhei a joke character who only exists to get folded by the heroine Ingrid van Draakia in a short gag, he's an F-Rank Cyberknight with an Armament in the form of a goddamn Refrigerator. One that could only make a cold breeze in comparison to the ice powers of Aishea Shirayuki, Kouki's childhood friend and my favorite waifu that I will be gunning for. Despite that, with my newfound power, I can finally pursue my dreams to become a great man in this world. Even with my trashy ability, I will reach the top of the world of Cyberknighthood by becoming the best student in Tenmu Academy and surpassing the strongest characters like Suishin Nishinomiya the school president and Kouki then achieve S-Rank. Hell, unlike him, I'll make my own harem! However, I never foresaw that the world had changed in mysterious ways I never expected. As my butterfly wings might not be the only pair fluttering a storm throughout this world... [This story takes place in the Fourth Layer of the Systemaverse] Platforms: Cross posted in Wattpad, Scribble Hub, AO3, and Royal Road.

records.title: [Eng] Lost to Remember
records.synopsis: To break a memory-reset curse, Lady Mrain sets out for a lost isle, risking everything to hold onto who she truly is. --- Every morning, life begins again. Could you survive a life where everything is forgotten each day? Mrain does. Her only lifeline is a diary--and the secondhand trust she gives to those around her. But now, she's asking questions she shouldn't. About a place no one dares to speak of. A place she isn't supposed to know... yet it keeps calling to her. And as the echoes grow louder, she begins to wonder: What if some memories refuse to be forgotten?

records.title: Giants in the Sky- Book 1 of The Forgotten Tales Series
records.synopsis: When a sickness continues to spread through her kingdom, caused by fallen fragments from the land above- rumors begin to stir that something ancient has awakened. Then the earth trembles, and the giants long thought to be myths return to the land of men. As her world collapses, Princess Margaret discovers that the cure for the ill and the truth behind her kingdom's prosperity, may lie in the forgotten land of the giants. To save her people, she must climb higher than her ancestors ever dared and face the history her bloodline tried to bury. Because not all giants are monsters. And not all humans are innocent.

records.title: SAVIORS BY BLOOD
records.synopsis: What happen when a kingdom which was 100 light years away from earth destroys suddenly. The king and family started to live in earth and protecting it from the evil eyes. Their children became the saviors of the earth. Their little sister whom they love more than their life hides a biggest truth from them which can tear the heart of the family.

records.title: Reincarnated as a Haunted House - Part 1 - The Serpent Forest
records.synopsis: Finn Darkling of the Nightmare, formerly known as Vansh, the owner of a renowned haunted house, unexpectedly meets his demise as he falls asleep one final time within his beloved establishment. To his astonishment, he awakens in an entirely new existence-a sentient haunted house located on an isolated island, shrouded by a dense forest and surrounded by a tranquil lake. Soon he learns that the place where he reincarnated is called the Serpent Forest, one of the 12 unruly lands, and the territory of Orochi, the colossal 8-headed serpent. Consequently, no other humanoid race dares to step foot into the Serpent Forest. As a stationary house, Finn finds himself unable to move physically. However, he possesses the unique ability to manifest as an apparition, allowing him to roam within the confines of the island. Loneliness became his constant companion until the arrival of winter when the lake froze over and a curious girl appeared at his doorstep. Soon, more individuals unexpectedly stumble upon his doorstep, and Finn finds himself drawn further into this intricate fantasy world. A world teeming with monsters and beings beyond his wildest imagination. ----------Support the story by------------ 1. Commenting 2. Voting 3. Adding it to your Reading List 4. Sharing

records.title: Crimson Qi, Exiled Beautiful Lady Falls in Love with a Shy Demon
records.synopsis: An unlucky noblewoman precipitates a civil war and falls for a half-demonic beggar with a self-destructive healing talent. Summary: Tien Lyn was born lucky, but her luck ran out fast. Tossed on the currents of politics and magic, she lives in the accursed 'interesting times', during a civil war. Her worst enemy is a song that glorifies her as a rebel leader's lover. Once she helps an unassuming healer, Demure Yu, avoid execution for consorting with demons, her list of powerful enemies grows ever faster. To shelter the man she loves, Tien Lyn has to do what it takes to outrun her own legend. If you see this book on any other site, they'd stolen it. If they're charging you for it, this is the best and free version. Please read it here. First Published: May 29, 2018

records.title: Witch Doctors Inc: SEASON ONE (Completed!)
records.synopsis: 🌟WATTYS 2023 SHORTLIST 🌟WATTYS 2023 FANS CHOICE AWARDS NOMINEE 🌟WATTYS 2022 SHORTLIST 🌟Editor's Pick (Reading Radar) Feb 2024 🌟 Featured Wattpad Pick x 4 (Wattpad HQ) 🌟 16 × Wattpad featured (Ambassador profiles) *** Welcome to Witch Doctors Inc. Rumour has it there's a real witch around here, and her destiny has "death" written all over it. She's the last in a line of reincarnations that have all turned to evil. She'll have to battle the darkness inside her, as well as: (a) interplanetary demons (b) ancient curses that she may have cast herself (c) elusive red-eyed creatures who steal hearts Will she win the battle for her soul? Or will the First Witch's tragic story repeat itself once again? A hidden marriage and ... 🪷

records.title: Zodiac Academy
records.synopsis: Zodiac Academy contains all twelve signs. They each have responsibilities. You're taken from your parents a day after birth. You are raised in an academy with twelve different people groups. If you don't pass a certain point after twelve years of Zodiac Academy, you're out. If you are out of the program, you are sent back to your families who had once been thrown out just like you. Now you're only purpose was to find a partner and live your life. With the addition that you supply them another baby in the future. If you passed their tests, you continue to study at the academy. Rebellious behavior is not tolerated in the academy and will get you thrown out at any time. There are three simple rules: One, Do not disobey any commands. Two, Loving Affection is highly prohibited. Three, Lies are unacceptable. Welcome to your new life. Your new home. Or what some of the people whisper, Welcome to your slow and painful death.
