records.title: STELLAR ACADEMY✔
records.synopsis: Stellar Academy. [School for supernaturals] "In order to have power is to take it" ©All rights reserved MoiSelle_Unicorn's Fantasy Collection started: Feb 6,2017 ended: February 25,2017

records.title: 𝑨 𝑺𝒐𝒏𝒈 𝒐𝒇 𝑳𝒊𝒈𝒉𝒕 𝒂𝒏𝒅 𝑺𝒉𝒂𝒅𝒐𝒘.
records.synopsis: "Bound by fate. Divided by war. Entwined by a love that could destroy them both." Seraphina, heir to the throne of the Kingdom of Elyndor had been born to be a flame and a light that keeps the perishable darkness at bay, where it belongs. With the weight of the crown already pressing upon her, she is aware of her duty: to protect her people from the ruthless heir of the Shadowlands, a man whispered of like a curse. But fate twists when Seraphina stumbles upon him-broken, bleeding, and vulnerable. Every instinct tells her to leave him to the night, yet her light refuses cruelty. With one act of mercy, she binds herself to the very enemy she was raised to despise. She expects never to see him again. Yet in the silence of sleep, their worlds collide once more. Through dreams not their own, light and shadow entwine-sparking battles of will, confessions never spoken aloud, and a dangerous closeness neither can escape. And as Seraphina's heart begins to betray her duty, she must face a truth more terrifying than war itself: sometimes the greatest danger does not come from the darkness outside... but from the fire it awakens within. For if Light and Shadow join, they could remake the world-or shatter it forever.

records.title: Enthralled By You
records.synopsis: He's beyond perfect. His domineering presence is undeniably formidable as he stood tall and proud towering all over us. He has a sleek hair that shines like silver it radiates a dainty source of light. When he smirks, it's wicked - enticing yet devilish. Everyone might find themselves get enthralled and he seems obviously aware of it. . . • ° • • ° • • ° • Under his mercy. . . Such a wonderful morning to behold. He will never forget her panic-driven face. Wrapping his arms around her - touching, enjoying and taking all advantage. The moment he cradled her, there's an overwhelming spark it strangely struck him all over. He felt her warmth - her genuine heart. Without hesitations, she clinged into him as her safe refuge. This is - He didn't expect this. He didn't want this. He just wants to play! * * * * * * * * * Faithfully sworn a sacred oath. . . Attaining ascension, destroying a curse . . . However, upon reaching a long-awaited chance, intention becomes a burden and oath is meant to be broken. When emotion hazes a resolute mind, resisting becomes a struggle. Bordering between oath and love, does altering the fate defeats an inevitable? Does heart prevails and strong enough to endure?

records.title: UNIFIED W
records.synopsis: In a world divided by seven powerful clans, centuries of hatred have kept the people trapped in an endless cycle of conflict. When Kai is chosen to reunite the clans and bring peace to the world, he quickly learns that fate has other plans for him. As war, betrayal, and hidden forces begin moving in the shadows, Kai is forced down a path filled with pain, sacrifice, and loss. Yet through every hardship, a mysterious voice continues to whisper: "One world. One people. One law."

records.title: 1/3 HOURS : The Boy Who Can See the Countdown to Death
records.synopsis: Aston Hailfire has the mysterious ability to see the "Death Clock" - a timer floating above people's heads that shows exactly when they will die. For a long time, he has been using this power to secretly save those around him from their fated deaths. But one day, the Death Clock suddenly appears above his own head, showing only 20 minutes remaining. With no direct control over the timer, Aston must use his wits, choices, and actions to change his fate before time runs out. Can he rewrite his remaining life through his own efforts?

records.title: Gate: Thus The United Kingdom of Agartha Fought There
records.synopsis: Agartha... A grand constitutional monarchy that has been isolated from the nations of Yggdra for over five thousand years, only to reveal itself a century ago. The nation prospers, advancing with both technology and magic, promoting equal rights among humans and non-humans, and ushering in an era of space exploration that has just begun. However, when a gate-like structure appears in the grand streets of Atheia City, the capital of Agartha, what comes next will be a daring choice, after all. Agartha will soon disseminate its five main ideologies to the new realm: Unity, Justice, Arts, Knowledge, and Liberty.

records.title: The Astral Six
records.synopsis: Six girls living in a perfect town discover they're the heirs of fallen goddesses - and the town was built to keep them trapped. As dangerous powers awaken before their eighteenth birthdays, Andy, Faye, Dahlia, Roxy, Eden, and Lyra uncover the truth: the gods were overthrown long ago, a brutal war nearly destroyed the world, and Apollo has spent years hiding them under false identities while planning revenge. Now hunted by his deadly children and torn between loyalty, power, and betrayal, the girls must decide whether to embrace the legacy they were born for... before it destroys them first. ✨

records.title: The World Thinks I'm Dead, So I Started Farming!
records.synopsis: For countless eras, Feng Liang answered every prayer. As a god, he believed it was his duty to listen to every plea, to respond to every cry for help. He never refused anyone. But somewhere along the way, he realized he had forgotten his own dream - to live for himself. In solving the world's problems, he had neglected his own wishes. "Do I not deserve a life of my own?" With that single question, he staged his death. While the heavens mourned and mortals wept at his funeral, the god they worshipped silently sealed his cultivation and vanished into a remote mountain village. Now, he farms for himself. He cooks for himself. He builds for himself. For the first time in eternity, he lives for himself. But even suppressed, his presence reshapes reality. Spirit herbs bloom where he walks. Mortal tools awaken into artifacts. And without their silent pillar, the balance of the heavens begins to fracture. The world thinks he's dead. And, he intends to keep it that way.

records.title: Ethan's Pokemon Journey!
records.synopsis: Finally! It's the day, 10 year old Ethan had dreamed of since he was a little kid. He finally gets to become a Pokemon Trainer! Thinking that his journey will be easy, he sets off to explore the Kanto Region. But he soon realizes the harsh reality of the pokemon world. With Team Rocket on the loose, Ethan and his friends, Luis, and Rylee travel around Kanto, hoping to foil their plans! (I do not own the image, and I found it on google)

records.title: Dark Tides (Kingdom of Bones #2)
records.synopsis: Dark Tides is now published as a Hardcover, and E-book with Wattpad Books! As a Wattpad reader, you can access the Wattpad Original Edition for free and the Wattpad Books Published Edition upon purchase. Thank you so much for your support! ☠ When love is an anchor, walking the plank is certain death. ☠ As the war between gods and mortals builds in crescendo, Csilla, Kane and Lorelei must not only protect their world from destruction, but also protect their hearts from looming devastation. Not everyone will survive the rising tides. ☠ / FANTASY / ADVENTURE / ROMANCE / First Draft Sequel to Crossbones

records.title: The Academy
records.synopsis: Romance: Harem inversé why choose - bully to lovers

records.title: The Death of a Tyrant's Concubine
records.synopsis: ❝𝐈 𝐥𝐨𝐯𝐞𝐝 𝐡𝐢𝐦 𝐞𝐯𝐞𝐧 𝐚𝐬 𝐡𝐞 𝐭𝐡𝐫𝐮𝐬𝐭 𝐡𝐢𝐬 𝐬𝐰𝐨𝐫𝐝 𝐫𝐢𝐠𝐡𝐭 𝐭𝐡𝐫𝐨𝐮𝐠𝐡 𝐦𝐞.❞ A hundred concubines lived in Emperor Sylvos' inner court - the heart of his thorned fortress. With a cruel ranking system, only favored concubines had the honor of meeting with His Majesty. And only the woman able to bear him a child could become empress. Raine Stjorme had climbed the ranks to the top. And after praying each night, she was finally with child. Yet all this was rewarded with the cruelest of fates. Murdered by the man she loved, Raine cursed Emperor Sylvos with her dying breath. She cursed his whole court as they snickered at her final moments. And her curse had taken root. Now, Raine awakens three years before her destined death, on the fateful day she first encounters the emperor. Armed with this second chance, she vows to make him fall - and to bring his empire down with him. But when faced with the tyrant who claimed her heart, could she still follow through? ✦✦✦ 𝙏𝙍𝙊𝙋𝙀𝙎 𝙄𝙉𝘾𝙇𝙐𝘿𝙀𝘿: -𝙀𝙣𝙚𝙢𝙞𝙚𝙨 𝙩𝙤 𝙡𝙤𝙫𝙚𝙧𝙨 -𝙎𝙚𝙘𝙤𝙣𝙙 𝙘𝙝𝙖𝙣𝙘𝙚 -𝙁𝙤𝙧𝙘𝙚𝙙 𝙥𝙧𝙤𝙭𝙞𝙢𝙞𝙩𝙮 -𝘼𝙧𝙧𝙖𝙣𝙜𝙚𝙙 𝙢𝙖𝙧𝙧𝙞𝙖𝙜𝙚 -𝙇𝙤𝙫𝙚 𝙩𝙧𝙞𝙖𝙣𝙜𝙡𝙚 -𝙑𝙞𝙡𝙡𝙖𝙞𝙣 𝙬𝙖𝙣𝙩𝙨 𝙩𝙝𝙚 𝙜𝙞𝙧𝙡 -𝘽𝙖𝙙𝙖𝙨𝙨 𝙁𝙈𝘾 -𝙈𝙖𝙜𝙞𝙘𝙖𝙡 𝙘𝙧𝙚𝙖𝙩𝙪𝙧𝙚𝙨

records.title: I won't die as your villainess.
records.synopsis: I woke up as the villainess destined to be ruined. The cold prince? Not interested. The perfect heroine? Not my problem. The family that will abandon me? Already irrelevant. This story expects me to beg, fight, and fall. Too bad I have better plans. While everyone chases love and drama, I'll build power. While they watch for my downfall, I'll prepare my escape. And when they finally realize I've changed- I'll already be gone. I won't die as your villainess.

records.title: The Villainous Female Became Everyone's Favorite
records.synopsis: After an all-night livestream, Fu Lingxi transmigrates into a beast world novel she had been listening to before sleep. Unfortunately, she becomes the arrogant fake heiress of the Phoenix Tribe - a vicious female who forcibly bound five beast husbands to herself, abused them relentlessly, and was eventually killed by the very villainous beastmen she tormented. Looking at the wounded beast husbands in front of her, Fu Lingxi immediately decides: Break the contracts. Return to the Peacock Tribe. Survive at all costs. Armed with only her portable garden space, Fu Lingxi begins growing rare plants, creating perfumes to soothe the beastmen's violent mating instincts, and cooking enough food to keep everyone alive. But somehow, the beast husbands who once wanted her dead begin changing one after another. The Frost Dragon lowered his gaze. "I keep my promises, Lingxi. You should keep yours too." The Giant Stone Serpent said quietly, "Lingxi, I want to stay by your side until death do us part." The Phantom Deer's voice was gentle. "As long as I'm here, no one will harm you." The Wind Leopard shamelessly clung to her. "I don't care. I just want to stay with you, Lingxi. You're not allowed to abandon me." Even the Azure Golden-Scaled Merman willingly offered her his priceless tears. "If you care for me a little more... every tear I shed can belong to you." Fu Lingxi retreated tactically. "Wait a minute- weren't all of you shouting about breaking the contract before?! How did you suddenly turn into dog-skin plasters that refuse to come off?!"

records.title: Saanvi - Daughter of Vaikuntha
records.synopsis: What if destiny wasn't just about winning the war between good and evil... but about finding the family your soul has always craved? Saanvi-a girl born with powers not meant for mortals, a Devta Putri hiding in the shadows of the human world. She has lived her life alone, telling herself she doesn't need anyone. Families break. Love hurts. Belonging is a dream she cannot afford. But fate has other plans. When she crosses paths with a family broken by pain and waiting for a miracle, something inside her begins to change. For the first time, she laughs, she feels, she wonders what it means to have a home. And for them, she is more than just a girl-she might be the missing piece of their story, the answer to prayers left unheard for years. Yet shadows always follow the light. Will Saanvi embrace the bond destiny is offering her... or walk away before she risks her heart again?

records.title: MISTRESS OF FLAME
records.synopsis: [ BOOK 1 OF AZITERA: YTHER'S QUEEN ] Consumed by avarice, the four human kingdoms-the Infernal Empire, the Kingdom of Caelum, the Kingdom of Treterra, and the Nayale Archipelago-betrayed their covenant with Yther of Azitera, the race blessed by deities, who protected humans for untold centuries. They slaughtered and defiled the beings that once protected them from storm, famine, poverty, and pestilence without mercy. Betrayed by the humans they protected, the Ytherians were enslaved. Their four queens were caged, chained, and imprisoned to serve as nutrients to the human kingdoms. The once prominent Ytherians were reduced to nothing but servants. As the four kingdoms of the human race prospered for many years since their betrayal, one news staggered them, causing them to tremble in fear and rally their armies to protect and defend their domain: Sollel-the Mistress of Flame, one of Yther's queens-had escaped her prison. Her flames will raze hell, ready to burn the souls of her betrayers. COMPLETED CECELIB | C.C. COVER: ASTRID JAYDEE

records.title: The Obsidian Bloodline
records.synopsis: The night she was cast aside, Iris Valtorien did not beg, scream, or curse the crown. She left. Branded unstable. Unfit. Forgotten. Six years later, she returns-not as a discarded wife, but as the Sovereign of the Obsidian Keep, a power the Empire buried two centuries ago. The Crown Prince chose ambition over blood. Now his greatest regret walks the capital in shadows... and his daughter calls him "Your Highness" instead of "Father". In a court ruled by legacy, silence is sharper than steel-and the Night remembers everything

records.title: The Duke Fell for the Villainess
records.synopsis: She was just a tired grade school teacher in the modern world- unappreciated, overworked, and denied her promotion year after year. Her only escape was her favorite otome game... until a tragic accident with a banana peel ended her life. When she opened her eyes again, she wasn't in her small apartment anymore. She was in a luxurious mansion. In a child's body. The villainess of her favorite game. Born as the real daughter of a Marquis, she knew how her story was supposed to end: starvation, betrayal, poison, and death. Her stepmother and stepsister would steal everything from her, and her own father would let her die without a tear. But this time, she refuses to play the role of a doomed villainess. Armed with memories from her past life, loyal brothers at her side, and a sharp tongue sharpened by years of teaching, she'll rewrite fate itself. Yet the world of nobility is more dangerous than she imagined- scheming crown princes, false heroines, poisonous stepmothers, and a cold northern Duke whispered to be a beast. But what if the "beast" turns out to be the one man who sees her for who she truly is?

records.title: The Burning of Sana Lightbourne
records.synopsis: Unable to control the elements or shift into birds of prey, Sana Lightbourne is a scab on her noble family's legacy. They cast her out to marry Lord Rhyel, the cold, fearsome ruler of House Darcanos. If the northern tyrant doesn't kill her for being useless, whatever lurks within his northern shadows will. While the Alpha wolf of Darcanos craves a true mate, he doesn't need another meaningless betrothal, especially not to a daughter from the overzealous House Lightbourne. Meeting Sana in the clutches of a golem, Rhyel's plagued with an unusual yearning to protect the scrawny, malnourished woman. When Sana becomes the chosen soul of a powerful ancient moth, she may not be as ungifted as she or her family believes. As Sana and Rhyel's relationship blooms and her gifts awaken, they attract the attention of House Darcanos' rival, House Issian-igniting a centuries-old feud between the wolves, the chimera, and the wraiths living in the beyond eager to consume her soul. ******* Highest Ranking #3 in Shifter #3 in Romantasy #4 in Interracial

records.title: The Alchemy Empress: 10,000 Years Later
records.synopsis: After 10,000 years perfecting a single pill, Bai Fanxian emerges from seclusion to find the world has moved on without her. Cultivation is now rare and weak, True Alchemy have faded into legend, and the modern world has no idea what masters of the past could achieve. Armed with ancient mastery and unmatched power, she'll remind everyone why "Alchemy Empress" was once the most revered title in the cultivation world. ---------------------------------------------------------------- You can read 30+ more chapters on Patreon! Rate/Review if you're enjoying the story Patreon: patreon.com/LittleKnight (Link also in my profile)

records.title: The Villainess Will Not Bring Dishonor To Her Family
records.synopsis: Rei, a former samurai lieutenant is reincarnated into the body of an 8 year old, who happens to be the main villainess in a romance novel for foreign girls. A villainess destined to be executed by her fiancé the crown prince for cruelty towards the heroine of the novel. To avoid being executed she must to make allies among her enemies, get out of the heroine's way, and untangle herself from the poisonous intrigue of court the best she can in the role of a future courtier. However, the vaguely described backdrop said nothing about the conflicts building beyond the heroine's understanding, or that women weren't allowed on the battlefield. I am honestly left speechless. I am very touched and honored by all the attention, by all the sweet, beautiful and fun comments I've received over the last month, it's been truly amazing. To those who already enjoy it, I hope you will continue to do so. To those who decide to pick it up, I hope you have as much fun with it as I did!

records.title: The Duke's Relentless Obsession [COMPLETED]
records.synopsis: Seraphina Ravelle, the stepdaughter of Marquess Edric, grew up surrounded by luxury-but behind the mansion doors, cruelty ruled. Her mother, Isadora Ravelle, used her power to torment the Marquess's first daughter, Liora. Seraphina loved her sister dearly, yet she could never show it. Desperate to save Liora from their mother's abuse, Seraphina secretly forged a letter and sent a marriage proposal in her sister's name to the feared Grand Duke, Izek Viremont. But instead of accepting Liora... the Duke sent the proposal back-to Seraphina. Why would one of the most powerful men in the kingdom choose her? And what does the Duke truly want?

records.title: [COMPLETED] I Reincarnated as the Evil Mother
records.synopsis: Hestia del Rosario is a powerful noblewoman born from proud house of the Rosario Marchiony. She is known for tormenting her own daughter for the simple reason of... not being born a boy. In the original story, she died a brutal death at the hands of her husband: the Duke himself. Her daughter? Left to rot in the woods... until the female lead finds her and raises her as her own. I was just your ordinary about to be transmigrated girl before I died. But then i suddenly woke up and became the abusive, spoiled, and "evil mother" who died in chapter three! Getting poisoned by my husband? No way! Letting my daughter be taken away by a kind-hearted commoner? Well it can't be helped! She is the Female Lead, who can resist such charm?! But dying again? Absolutely not! "Your grace please don't hurt me" "Your grace I'm sorry, I won't do it again!" "Mommy...?" "Mom, where are you going?" "Mom, please don't leave me here with Dad. I want to go with you!" If I want to survive in this story, I have to rewrite the role I've been given before the main plot catches up to me. All I need to do is not abuse my daughter, do not blackmail the Duke because of my family's fame and connections, not be evil, and maybe, just maybe, I'll avoid my death. ...Hopefully. "Who says that we're getting divorced?" "We don't even love each other! I want to get married to a man that I love!" "Then love me, can't you do that?" First the child doesn't need the Female Lead, now my husband is clinging onto me? Date started: August 3, 2025 Date Finished: February 27, 2026 🏆 Rank 12 at Fantasy-Romance

records.title: The Inured Villainess
records.synopsis: Inure: (v.) To accustom to accept something undesirable, evil, or painful. An other worldly girl is reincarnated as Queen Estella de Royalis, the villainess of a novel that is killed by her own husband. Having no other choice, she strives to save herself from that fate. However, the novel she read is not the reality she believed. ______ I tried on another, a red one this time. I twirl in its large skirt. "This one matches your eyes," I say as I spin. "This one too." I stop, putting my hands on my hips. "Are you going to order all of them?" "If I want to, yes, I will." He doesn't budge. I sigh, sitting next to him. "You know that you don't have to do this. I can go buy my own dresses." "I know, but I want to see you wear dresses that I chose. Besides, is it so wrong to want to spend time with you?" ______ Note: This is entirely my work. I want to see if I'm able to write something without a plot set up for me. I hope you like it!

records.title: I Can't Eat Love
records.synopsis: Lenora did not have a wonderful life. After her engagement to Prince Ronan is broken, she loses everything... her reputation, her home, and her family. Starving on the streets, she dies angry and bitter at how her life unfolded... Only to wake up in her old bed, fifteen again, five years before she died. Now she must struggle to change her fate, and the fate of those around her. This time she won't trust in something as flimsy or changeable as love. No, this time she'll have the power and the money to protect herself. Lenora has already lost everything once. She's not going to lose again. No matter what the cost. (Cover submitted by @QueenHelmer)

records.title: After Giving Birth, All My Beast Ex-Husbands Suddenly Want Me Back(PART 2)
records.synopsis: Nina Song transmigrates into the beast world-only to discover she's become the most infamous "useless" female alive. She's ugly, talentless, infertile, and utterly unloved by her parents. Her reputation is so terrible that everyone despises her. Her only saving grace? She has eight powerful and devastatingly handsome fiancés. Unfortunately, on the very day of the wedding procession, disaster strikes. Seven fiancés publicly break off the engagement. One outright runs away. Humiliated and abandoned, Nina is exiled by her scumbag father. And as if fate isn't cruel enough-on the road to exile, she discovers she's pregnant. With nowhere to go, Nina survives alone in the wilderness, struggling to give birth and raise her children by herself. She vows that no matter how hard life becomes, she will protect her babies at all costs. But just as her peaceful life begins to stabilize... Why do the children's scumbag fathers start appearing one by one? Worse still, they're none other than the cold-blooded fiancés who once rejected her. So now you want to snatch my children? Dream on! Except... they don't seem to be here for the kids at all.

records.title: Surviving As A Cannon Fodder
records.synopsis: Being a normal college student, Eunseo was reincarnated into a book she barely remembers as a no-name canon fodder. To survive in an unknown world she devises a plan and cuts herself off from the main plot. But there she was years later standing neck-deep in trouble which she believed she had escaped. Will Eunseo be able to survive yet again?

records.title: The Great Assassin Is Reincarnated As The Weakest Princess
records.synopsis: BOOK 1: TGAIRATWP A seemingly perfect young tycoon and model hides a deadly secret: she's a Rank S assassin. But when she dies, she's reborn in the body of a desperate princess, who's desperate for love and attention from her family. Now, trapped in a life of luxury and social obligations, she must choose between her past life of shadows or finding true acceptance within her new royal world.

records.title: Zombie Beatdown: Fire Queen is Back
records.synopsis: Five years into the apocalypse, humanity has lost all sense of compassion. Lara didn't die at the jaws of the zombies-yet she fell victim to the greed of those she once called comrades. When she opens her eyes again, she's six years in the past-before the world collapsed, before the people she loved perished because of her mistakes. This time, she swears: she will rise from the ashes, no longer the pawn, never the prey. She will do whatever it takes to protect herself... and the ones she truly cares about. But just when she starts reclaiming her life, a persistent senior-charming, irritating, and utterly shameless-shows up, begging to join her side, begging for protection, begging to be kept close. How will Lara handle him... without losing herself again?

records.title: She, Whom They Called 'Wicked': Death Wears Her Roses Now
records.synopsis: © moonpsyche_, 2025. Original Work. Plagiarism is Prohibited. Akira "G6" Gemstone was an assassin known for two things: her ruthless efficiency and her secret love for tragic romance novels. But in a twist of fate she never saw coming, she's reincarnated as the very villainess she once mocked-Reise Worthon, the Wicked Rose. Doomed to a life of heartache and a swift, painful end, the original Reise's story was a tragedy waiting to happen. But G6 doesn't do tragic endings. Armed with a killer's instincts and a temper sharper than any blade, she's about to rewrite this story and cut anyone who gets in her way.

records.title: The Villainess is Weird (English Version) - Completed
records.synopsis: Alexandria was just a regular high school student-until she woke up in the body of the villainess from the internet novel her best friend had written. A villainess doomed to die at the tender age of sixteen, no matter who the heroine ends up with. Now trapped in a world of extravagant gowns, scheming nobles, and an overcomplicated plot, Alexandria has only one goal: to survive. Her plan? Avoid the novel's characters at all costs and rewrite her fate into a peaceful, uneventful life-even if it means flipping the story upside down. But fate seems to have other plans. From coincidental meetings with key characters to unraveling secrets she was never meant to know, Alexandria's carefully laid plans start crumbling faster than a dry biscuit in soup. Will she manage to dodge the death flags looming over her, or is destiny determined to keep her story on track?

records.title: Dungeon Diver: Stealing a Monster's Power
records.synopsis: A story following a young hunter named Jay. He has grown up in a world where dungeons, monsters, and humans with leveling systems are a cultural norm. At the age of 20, he awakens a skill that allows him to steal the abilities of monsters. While others are stuck with a specific skill set, he continues to grow stronger after every battle. Follow Jay's journey as he learns more about his unique situation in a world that's grown blind to the real dangers of modern-day dungeon diving. What to expect: -Weak To Strong Male MC -Fast Leveling + Rare Magical Items -Stats + Hidden Abilities + LitRPG System -Explosions, Monsters, & Epic Battles [Daily uploads, a minimum of 7 chapters per week.]

records.title: Reincarnating into a Beautiful Woman
records.synopsis: There lived a handsome prince engaged to the most beautiful woman in the world. Despite her beauty, she failed to capture the prince's heart. Instead, the prince fell for a rather average woman who also captured the heart of the cold, Second Prince. Blinded by jealousy, the beautiful woman was eventually killed by the Second Prince. The lesson of this story emphasizes that looks aren't everything, and what really matters is the 'true beauty' inside a person's heart. Yeon-Woo is a middle aged woman in her late 30s. After she passes away from a plane incident with her loving husband, she wakes up as Celine, the beautiful woman who is fated to die. As Yeon-Woo rewrites her story, she learns how to heal and love again. DISCLAIMER: although the story is mine, the art was not done by me!

records.title: Her Story, My Soul
records.synopsis: Synopsis Yuna Seo, a sharp-tongued CEO from Seoul, never believed in romance novels - until she mysteriously dies after mocking one. She awakens as Selene Valen, the beautiful and infamous villainess of Love's Illusion, a character destined for ruin. Determined to rewrite her fate, Selene soon realizes this story isn't just romance - it hides a dark mystery that may cost her life again. In a story where the villainess is meant to fall... what happens when she refuses to? ⸻ Disclaimer: The story is written in English. Date Started: November 12, 2022 Date Finished: On going
